feat.name: Punishing Shove
feat.text: When you push a foe away, you put the entire force of your armored form into it. When you successfully Shove a creature, that creature takes an amount of bludgeoning damage equal to your Strength modifier (or double that amount on a critical success). This damage increases by 2 when you become an expert in Athletics, 6 when you become a master, and 12 when you become legendary.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
